allow: PowerShell($base = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Python\\Python312"; $py = Join-Path $base "python.exe"; if\(Test-Path $py\){ "FOUND: $py"; & $py --version; & $py -m pip --version } else { "Not at $py - searching..."; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Python" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name })
